title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kansai Nerolac - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kansai Nerolac - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Kansai Nerolac is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kansai Nerolac:
Kansai Nerolac is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kansai Nerolac!
